title: Incident
description: A reported event on the transport network that affects normal service operations, such as a disruption, roadblock, or infrastructure failure.

incidentType.description: Type of incident (e.g. DISRUPTION, ROADBLOCK, MAINTENANCE)

severity.description: Severity level of the incident (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH)

affectedArea.description: Geographic area affected by the incident

startTime.description: Date and time the incident started

endTime.description: Expected or actual end date and time of the incident

validity.description: Time period during which the alert is active
